raw: Each pass provides up to four (4) people with $5 admission per person. Children under the age of 18 are always admitted for free. This library pass does not guarantee a reservation to the Museum, you need to reserve a time slot with the Museum as well.

source_phrases.free_under_age: Children under the age of 18 are always admitted for free
source_phrases.exclusions: you need to reserve a time slot with the Museum as well
source_phrases.max_people: up to four (4) people with $5 admission per person
